description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with both arms raised and crossed above the head. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, paired with closed-toe shoes. The figure has medium-length, straight hair that is parted in the middle and falls just above the shoulders. The facial features are stylized and the body proportions are realistic, with visible articulation at the shoulders, elbows, and knees. The arms are unusually elongated and exaggerated, creating a striking visual effect. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban attire suitable for walking or standing in public spaces.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian stands upright with both arms raised and crossed above the head, featuring realistic proportions and stylized details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, sleeveless top, straight pants, and both arms raised and crossed above the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's exaggerated length, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the top, and the crossed arms from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the arm's length, and the side of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants with closed-toe shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised and crossed above the head
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair parted in the middle
